rationale: This sibling lane hardens prompt rendering, template versioning, redaction, injection boundaries, and protected-attribute prompt handling without touching runtime files, so the prompt/runtime governance rule remains enforceable.
verification: uv run ty check src tests tools
uv run pytest tests/test_liepin_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_cli.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py -q
deletion_targets: free-form untrusted data interpolation in prompt templates
prompt-safety assumptions that are not covered by injection fixtures
protected-attribute prompt instructions that ask an LLM to filter or rank by age, gender, or school names
risks: This prompt lane must never include src/seektalent/runtime/ files.
Runtime-lane work must restack on the updated main after this prompt lane lands so prompt files are not part of the runtime branch diff.
